'''Shiner''' was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] assigned to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] pilot [[Myn Donos]]. Shiner served with Donos in [[Talon Squadron (New Republic)|Talon Squadron]] until the unit's destruction at [[Gravan Seven]], and then went with him to the newly formed [[Wraith Squadron]]. Donos viewed him as the last surviving member of Talon Squadron, whose destruction he felt responsible for. Shiner was destroyed during the Wraiths' battle with the ''[[Blood Nest]]'' pirates, which nearly sent Donos into severe depression.
